seo.title: Bar and Brunch on Mission Blvd - Mission Beach San Diego
seo.description: Miss B's Coconut Club is Mission Beach San Diego's favorite outdoor bar and brunch spot. Craft cocktails, daily brunch, and private events at 3704 Mission Blvd.

hero.imageAlt: Miss B's Coconut Club teal bar open window Mission Beach San Diego
hero.eyebrow: 3704 Mission Blvd · Mission Beach, San Diego
hero.heading: Miss B's
hero.subheading: San Diego's open-air bar and brunch destination. Steps from the Pacific on Mission Blvd.

intro.imageAlt: Miss B's Coconut Club tropical dining room with mural Mission Beach San Diego
intro.heading:
Where San Diego
Comes to Drink Well
body: Miss B's Coconut Club is the open-air bar and brunch spot that Mission Beach was built for. Pull up a teal stool, order something cold, and let the afternoon go.
Located at 3704 Mission Blvd — steps from the sand. Come for the craft cocktails. Stay for the brunch. Bring the whole group.

cocktailFeature.imageAlt: Miss B's Coconut Club signature flamingo cocktail vessel Mission Beach
cocktailFeature.heading:
Signature
Cocktails in
Mission Beach
cocktailFeature.body: From the flamingo vessel to the frozen mojito, every drink at Miss B's is built for the San Diego sun. Tropical, bold, and entirely unforgettable.

happyHour.imageAlt: Miss B's Coconut Club open-air bar during happy hour Mission Beach San Diego
happyHour.heading:
Happy Hour
in Mission Beach
happyHour.bodyMiddle: , on the full open-air bar and patio.

brunch.imageAlt: Miss B's Coconut Club copper flamingo draft tap handles Mission Beach
brunch.heading:
Brunch
in Mission Beach
brunch.body: Served daily until 2pm. Mimosas from the flamingo tap wall, morning cocktails, and the best brunch plates on Mission Blvd.

featured.name: Coconut Club Burger
featured.alt: Miss B's Coconut Club Coconut Club Burger Mission Beach San Diego

privateEvents.imageAlt: Miss B's Coconut Club outdoor patio pink umbrellas Mission Beach San Diego private events
privateEvents.heading:
Private Events
in Mission Beach
privateEvents.body: Birthdays, buyouts, corporate events, and intimate gatherings. Miss B's Coconut Club is the only open-air bar venue on Mission Blvd — steps from the Pacific.
